headline: Stronger Q3 Beat And Institutional Support Might Change The Case For Investing In Fox (FOXA)
summary: In May 2026, Fox Corporation reported fiscal third-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations on both revenue and earnings, reinforcing its position across FOX News Media, FOX Sports, and Tubi Media Group. Large long-term holders such as the Yacktman Focused Fund and rising hedge fund ownership have signaled ongoing confidence in Fox’s business model despite earlier share weakness. We’ll now examine how Fox’s stronger-than-expected quarterly results and reaffirmed institutional...
